parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Jira destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise jira:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Jira REST API v2 issue payload delivered straight to your Jira instance (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Jira destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Jira REST API v2 (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Jira apikey
